title: Fresh Chewy Jamaican Goat Stew
description: A hearty, protein-packed Jamaican goat stew with tender, chewy meat and vibrant spices.

ingredients.name: scotch bonnet pepper, seeded and minced

instructions: Heat olive oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add diced onion and cook until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Stir in minced garlic, ginger, and scotch bonnet pepper; cook for 1 minute until fragrant.
Add tomato paste, thyme, allspice, and brown sugar, stirring to combine and cook for 2 minutes.
Add the cubed goat meat, stirring to coat with the spice mixture.
Pour in vegetable stock and bring to a gentle simmer.
Add a bay leaf (optional) and reduce heat to low, covering the pot.
Simmer for 60-75 minutes, turning occasionally, until the goat is tender and the flavors meld.
Remove from heat, discard bay leaf if used, taste and adjust salt and pepper if needed.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh cilantro.
Enjoy your Fresh Chewy Jamaican Goat Stew!
